productDisplayName: Clarks Men Hang Tough Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Enjoy the luxury of royal footwear in this smart Hang Tough slip-on leather shoe from clarks. The flexible non-slip composition sole enhances foot luxury without compromising on durability, while the soft leather apron front makes it perfect for both formal and casual occasions.UpperFull grain leather upper in a slip-on style for absolute comfortTramline seamed and stitched leather apron frontConcealed elastic side gussets for easy insertion and removal of feetSheepskin and fabric inner lining for abrasion-free wearMildly padded collar for comfortHas a generous G-width fittingMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfortSoft leather footbed for cushioned, all-day comfortOutsoleDurable textured rubber outsole with suction grooves throughout the forefoot and grooves on the heel in a horse shoe shape for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves in the forefoot for flexible movementOne-piece moulded sole unit featuring Cushion Cell heel for absolute cushioningCurved midfoot for inner-arch supportRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
